rules.name: Representative_vertreten_durch
rules.description: Captures the name of a representative (lawyer/tax advisor) introduced by 'vertreten durch', ensuring it stops before the company name or address.

rules.name: Herr_Name
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Herr' or 'Herrn', ensuring the full name is extracted including titles like Mag., Dr., etc.

rules.name: Frau_Name
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Frau', ensuring the full name is extracted including titles if present.

rules.name: Herr_Name_Corrected
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Herr' or 'Herrn', ensuring it matches a name (not a title) and handles German characters.

rules.name: Party_Name_Complex_Title
rules.description: Captures names with complex titles (e.g., Mag., Dr., Priv.-Doz.) appearing after 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'des/der'.

rules.name: Judge_Title_Name
rules.description: Captures judges with titles appearing before 'in der Beschwerdesache', explicitly excluding the 'Richter'/'Richterin' prefix and capturing only the name and title.

rules.name: Name_In_Parentheses
rules.description: Captures names appearing inside parentheses, often used for party identification, ensuring it is a valid name and not an acronym or organization.

rules.name: Name_After_Von_Zu
rules.description: Captures names following prepositions 'von' or 'zu' which are common in legal texts for ownership or direction.

rules.name: Name_After_Von_An_Bei_Fuer
rules.description: Captures names following prepositions 'von', 'an', 'bei', 'für' which are common in legal contexts for ownership or direction.

rules.name: Complex_Title_HR_KzlR
rules.description: Captures names with complex titles like 'HR KzlR' which are common in Austrian legal texts but not covered by standard title patterns.

rules.name: Complex_Title_Techn_R_OMedR
rules.description: Captures names with complex titles like 'Techn R OMedR' which are common in Austrian legal texts.

rules.name: Name_After_Mandantin
rules.description: Captures names following 'Mandantin' (female client) or 'Mandant' (male client), ensuring the full name including titles is extracted.

rules.name: Name_After_Ehepaar
rules.description: Captures names following 'Ehepaar' (couple), ensuring both names are captured if present.

rules.name: Name_After_Ehepaar_Second
rules.description: Captures the second name in a couple following 'Ehepaar ... und ...'.

rules.name: KommR_Ing_Title
rules.description: Captures the specific 'KommR Ing.' title pattern followed by a full name, ensuring the title is included.

rules.name: Name_After_Preposition
rules.description: Captures names after prepositions 'von', 'an', 'bei', strictly excluding case types and organization names, and excluding months.

rules.name: Party_Genitive_Case
rules.description: Captures names following 'des' or 'der' (genitive case) in complaint contexts, ensuring the name is extracted correctly even with titles, but explicitly excluding the preceding case type word.

rules.name: Party_After_Case_Type
rules.description: Captures the name of a party appearing immediately after a case type word (e.g., 'in der Sache Name'), ensuring the case type word is excluded.

rules.name: Name_After_Verb
rules.description: Captures names appearing after common legal verbs like 'brachte', 'führte', 'war', 'hat', ensuring the name is extracted correctly.

rules.name: Name_At_Start_Of_Sentence
rules.description: Captures names appearing at the start of a sentence or after a period, ensuring the name is extracted correctly.

rules.name: Name_After_Preposition_Fuer
rules.description: Captures names after preposition 'für', strictly excluding case types and organization names.
